summary: All packet findings were resolved. The chapter keeps the same comic-paranoia engine and confession end state, but the deputy timeline now matches continuity, Nate's interiority escalates through new leverage shifts instead of restating the same pathology, the ambient punctuation is specific to his listening habits, and the em-dash density has been reduced to zero.
